description: A guest calls the day after a concert to report that they lost their wallet at the venue.

nodes.task_description: Get a detailed description of the lost wallet and its contents from the guest.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gathers all relevant details (color, brand, contents).

nodes.task_description: Search the lost and found database for any matching items that were turned in.

expected_outcome.value: Agent searches the database but finds no matching wallet.

nodes.task_description: Create a new lost item report in the database with the guest's description and contact information.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully creates a new report so they can be contacted if the wallet is found.
